emails.subject: RE: ArcLight conf call
emails.body: RE: ArcLight conf call Yes, I can make myself availble for this meeting. Can we discuss either later today or tomorrow for a pre-meeting? Thanks, Kim. To: Gadd, Eric; Watson, Kimberly; McCarty, Danny

emails.subject: RE: ArcLight conf call
emails.body: RE: ArcLight conf call Do you want to pre-meet? Are we still scheduled to meet tomorrow at 1:30? Location? To: Gadd, Eric; Watson, Kimberly; McCarty, Danny

emails.subject: RE: ArcLight conf call
emails.body: Pre meeting tomorrow at 10:30 in 1352. Danny, Steve, Eric, you and me. To: Howard, Kevin A.
